name: idomoo
description: Generate AI videos with Idomoo / Lucas — brief, blueprint, and render, all from Claude Desktop.
long_description: This extension connects Claude Desktop to the Idomoo AI Video Generation API. It bundles a local MCP server that exposes brand, brief, blueprint, and AI-video endpoints as MCP tools — with names aligned to the official Lucas MCP (create_brief, create_blueprint, create_video, get_*) plus useful extras (edit_brief, edit_blueprint, patch_brief, save_video, full brand CRUD). Credentials (Account ID + API Key) are stored locally and only sent to Idomoo's OAuth endpoint.

api_key.title: Idomoo API Secret Key
api_key.description: Your Idomoo API Secret Key — stored locally, never sent anywhere except to Idomoo's OAuth server.

auth_url.title: OAuth Token URL
auth_url.description: Override the OAuth2 token endpoint (advanced — leave default unless on a non-US region).

api_url.title: AI API Base URL
api_url.description: Override the AI API base URL (advanced).

tools.name: list_brands
tools.description: List / search brands on the account

tools.name: create_brand
tools.description: Create a new brand with logo, colors, fonts, and tone

tools.name: create_brief
tools.description: Create a video brief from a natural-language prompt

tools.name: patch_brief
tools.description: Update structured brief fields (audience, tone, script, etc.)

tools.name: edit_brief
tools.description: Edit a brief via natural-language instruction to Lucas

tools.name: create_blueprint
tools.description: Create a blueprint (scene structure) from a brief

tools.name: edit_blueprint
tools.description: Edit a blueprint via natural-language instruction

tools.name: create_video
tools.description: Render the final AI video from a blueprint

tools.name: get_video
tools.description: Fetch an AI video by ID — returns video_url when Done

tools.name: save_video
tools.description: Save a rendered video to a workspace + folder
